positions.notes: Silchester 5.05% disclosed Mar 2026, WAC ¥2,511. Tier 2 LONG-ONLY style (NOT Tier 1 activist) - thesis must stand on fundamentals + TSE reform. P/E 11.5x vs global peers 17-25x, 4.47% yield. India growth (Kansai Nerolac) hidden asset. Px below WAC = clean shadow co-investment. Entered Apr 1 2026 funded from Daito Trust trim. Patient 24-36mo horizon. [2026-04-30 VERIFICATION-AUDIT] Silchester (E24872) filed initial 5.05% on Apr 1, 2026 (stock +7% on news to ¥2,496). Filing language unusually activist for Silchester: explicit demands include 増配, 自己株式買い入れ, 金庫株消却, 資本政策の変更. Voting reservations on M&A, director appointments. Departs from Silchester's typical quiet-accumulator stylebook. Cross-reference Silchester's 65 Japan holdings: most are mature 8-19% multi-year ratchets (e.g., Sumitomo Osaka Cement 19.43%, Alfresa 12.11%, Suzuken 8.25%, Daito Trust 9.22%) — Kansai Paint is at the start of that pattern. Next catalyst: May 11 2026 earnings. No new filings/news past 7 days. [2026-05-01 NEWS-AUDIT] ?: 大量保有報告書ＤＢ [株主:E08957] 三井住友DS... (大量保有報告)
positions.thesis: Silchester long-only quality engagement. Japanese paint global #4 with significant India exposure (Kansai Nerolac). Trades at P/E 11.5x vs global paint peers (Sherwin ~25x, AkzoNobel ~17x), 4.47% yield. TSE PBR reform pressure + India growth = standalone case. Silchester pattern: patient 3-7yr holds, passive engagement, low-velocity.
positions.trigger: Watch: (1) Silchester accumulation past 7%+ (signals activist intent vs passive), (2) any cross-shareholder unwind announcement, (3) May 11 earnings, (4) India business strategic action (Kansai Nerolac listed separately)

last_filing.purpose: ACTIVIST INTENT (atypical for Silchester): may demand dividend hikes (増配), buyback frequency/total (自己株式の買い入れの頻度または総量), treasury share retirement (金庫株消却), other capital policy changes. May vote against M&A, asset disposals, director appointments. May add or sell.

reasons: Silchester WAC ¥2,511 confirmed; Px ¥2,380 below WAC; Our PWER 20.8% clears threshold; promote to L3 active book at 3% NAV per Apr 1 entry from Daito Trust trim
